speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: Hold, take these keys, and fetch more spices, nurse.

speaker: NURSE
text: They call for dates and quinces in the pastry.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Come, stir, stir, stir! The second cock hath crowed.

speaker: CAPULET
text: The curfew bell hath rung. ’Tis three o’clock.—

speaker: CAPULET
text: Look to the baked meats, good Angelica.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Spare not for cost.

speaker: NURSE
text: Go, you cot-quean, go,

speaker: NURSE
text: Get you to bed. Faith, you’ll be sick tomorrow

speaker: NURSE
text: For this night’s watching.

speaker: CAPULET
text: No, not a whit. What, I have watched ere now

speaker: CAPULET
text: All night for lesser cause, and ne’er been sick.

speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: Ay, you have been a mouse-hunt in your time,

speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: But I will watch you from such watching now.

speaker: CAPULET
text: A jealous hood, a jealous hood!

speaker: CAPULET
text: Now fellow,

speaker: CAPULET
text: What is there?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SERVINGMAN
text: Things for the cook, sir, but I know not what.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Make haste, make haste.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Sirrah, fetch drier logs.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Call Peter. He will show thee where they are.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SERVINGMAN
text: I have a head, sir, that will find out logs

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SERVINGMAN
text: And never trouble Peter for the matter.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Mass, and well said. A merry whoreson, ha!

speaker: CAPULET
text: Thou shalt be loggerhead.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Good faith, ’tis day.

speaker: CAPULET
text: The County will be here with music straight,

speaker: CAPULET
text: For so he said he would. I hear him near.—

speaker: CAPULET
text: Nurse!—Wife! What ho!—What, nurse, I say!

speaker: CAPULET
text: Go waken Juliet. Go and trim her up.

speaker: CAPULET
text: I’ll go and chat with Paris. Hie, make haste,

speaker: CAPULET
text: Make haste. The bridegroom he is come already.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Make haste, I say.
